subject: Get cm-handle state endpoint
commit_message:
Get cm-handle state endpoint

Added new get cm-handle state endpoint
Refactored RestOutputCmHandleState to CmHandleCompositeState
Created new RestOutputCmHandleCompositeState OpenApi object
^This is done so that we get '"state: {" at the start of JSON response
Refactored RestOutputCmHandleStateMapper to CmHandleStateMapper
Added more detailed composite state to get cmHandleDetails endpoint tests
Rebased code
Code rebased on top of 129658: Unable to change state from LOCKED to ADVISED | https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/cps/+/129658 which fixes output error

Issue-ID: CPS-1019
Signed-off-by: mpriyank <priyank.maheshwari@est.tech>
Signed-off-by: lukegleeson <luke.gleeson@est.tech>
Change-Id: I361117c98c256a4aa578c13d21926bc6d7876a15

Also I think this is only part of the User Story scope is that correct?

Patch Set 1:

(3 comments)

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> (4 comments)
> 
> A few questions mainly.
> Also I think this is only part of the User Story scope is that correct?

No this is only scope? Is there more expected? Most of the lower layer implementations of state handling have been dealt with in other commits. This is just to receive the state as a json payload

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> (3 comments)
> 
> > Patch Set 1:
> > 
> > (4 comments)
> > 
> > A few questions mainly.
> > Also I think this is only part of the User Story scope is that correct?
> 
> No this is only scope? Is there more expected? Most of the lower layer implementations of state handling have been dealt with in other commits. This is just to receive the state as a json payload

The Jira (of the parent task) mentioned these 3 endpoint(variation)s

http://<cps-servic>/ncmp/v1/ch/{cm-handle}
http://<cps-servic>/ncmp/v1/ch/{cm-handle}/properties
http://<cps-servic>/ncmp/v1/ch/{cm-handle}/state

I this subtask just for the third?
